title: Amenorrhea documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Supports clinician-performed pubertal, androgenic, thyroid and pelvic context and clinician-selected pregnancy, TSH, prolactin and FSH review; it does not auto-order or interpret tests.
examination.rationale: Supports clinician-performed assessment and selected test review.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-performed pubertal, androgenic, thyroid and pelvic context and clinician-selected pregnancy, TSH, prolactin and FSH review; it does not auto-order or interpret tests.

source.title: Current evaluation of amenorrhea: a committee opinion (2024)

exact_section.heading: Physical examination and initial laboratory evaluation
exact_section.locator: official HTML examination and laboratory-evaluation sections

examination.text: Supports clinician-directed pelvic imaging and additional evaluation only after history, examination and initial results narrow the context.
examination.rationale: Supports further evaluation only after the clinical context is known.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-directed pelvic imaging and additional evaluation only after history, examination and initial results narrow the context.

source.title: Current evaluation of amenorrhea: a committee opinion (2024)

medication.text: Supports distinguishing primary and secondary amenorrhea and recording menarche, cycle, pregnancy possibility, weight, exercise, medicines, galactorrhea, androgenic and vasomotor symptoms without assigning a cause.
medication.rationale: Supports entered primary or secondary amenorrhea history.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports distinguishing primary and secondary amenorrhea and recording menarche, cycle, pregnancy possibility, weight, exercise, medicines, galactorrhea, androgenic and vasomotor symptoms without assigning a cause.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, menarche, last period, cycle history, pregnancy status, symptoms, medicines, examination and results are absent.
No pregnancy exclusion, cause, test, treatment or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
